global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a clear promotional message.
global.main_message: Promoting a late-night 2-for-1 deal at a price of €9.99.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: 2-for-1 tonight
elements.description: Bold white text stating '2-for-1 tonight' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Late-night deals available
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that reads 'Late-night deals available'.

elements.label: Price €9.99
elements.description: A clear white text showing the price '€9.99' positioned below the body text.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Get offer' in white, inviting action.

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner displaying the name 'QuickFork' in a simple font.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge at the top right corner with the word 'SALE' in bold.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label at the bottom left corner that reads 'UGC' in a simple font.
elements.text_content: 2-for-1 tonight Late-night deals available €9.99 Get offer

elements.label: Two icons
elements.description: Two simple icons representing food items, placed above the headline.
